query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "eva-bench: a new end-to-end framework for evaluating voice agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a canonical benchmark framework for evaluating voice agents, directly addressing the user's interest in extending evaluation methodologies for this specific domain. It measures the same core constructs (voice agent performance, task completion, and interaction quality) and offers the necessary empirical baseline and methodological foundation for a literature review on voice agent evaluation.
